column1: Hey Meher, just saw you filled out our Go Blue booking form. which destination were you looking to book for this spring?
Cancun and we would like to book tonight if that's possible for march 14-18 for 4 people
I just emailed you the reservation, did that come through?

Also I noticed I had a typo in there on the dates. Its all correct on the actual reservation for March 14-18. Booze cruise is in there complimentary and added in what the pricing will look like if you add the 3 night party pass too
Without party pass the base is $554, and with the 3 night party pass its $764
ofc! if anyone has questions just shoot me a text
We are working out flights right now but if we don't get to submitting the booking tonight is there a way you can extend it
I should be able to, would have to put the request in and see
did you need help finding flights? I got you if so
Ok thank u the flights just went crazy up in price so we're trying to talk with all our parents
would you be open to shifting dates a little? may be able to get flights cheaper on the 15th or 16th
That's what we are trying to figure out if my friend can skip her class so she wants to talk with her teacher tomorrow which is why we would need the extension
which day does she have class that week
Friday so we are trying to see if she can get out of it
got you. we can always adjust the dates a little if anything too. just so you know
Ok we just want to make sure one of my friends ca go because she would have to fly to New Jersey after and a flight back into Tallahassee is over 600 right now
Let me know if you can get us that extension it would be sooo helpful sorry for the delay
just put the request in. ops team is offline since its late but they are periodically on
Hey morning, you're all good for the extension today btw
Is the booze cruise still included on there we just don't see it
booze cruise is there I see it on my end
"Discounted Cancun Booze Cruise" with the cruise icon next to it
says discounted because I hooked it up for free
Hi we are booking flights and might want to change our dates and add an extra night do yk how much more taht would've
cool just lmk soon as you can
Ok can you add the 13th night so 13th-18th
is a $130 price difference that cool?
Can u make it lower? Hahaha
lol wish I could, thats the standard for the 5 night stay
word will add that in now
It's not letting us pay for the extra pet
After I sign the agreement it's not letting us put in our card info
yoo sup Meher it's Spiffy from Spring Break U. any shot you lookin for help with spring break again for this year? would be down to hook it up for you
yo idk how you got looped in that text above ^ I'm sorry lol. but yea if you need anything with your reservation lmk
My friend has paid her balance and it says total paid but the why above does it say unpaid?
Hey all good no worries I noticed thats happened to a few ppl. Will flag it to our UI team
On our end, I see she paid the $753 on the 27th, and just has a balance remaining of $130
Hi! Just had a question about an email I received. We have booked the three night party package but we are confused why we have to pay extra some nights. Is that for people without the package?
hey Meher! thanks for the patience I've been on commute
so, with the party pass you typically have atleast 2 options a night with your tickets. the ones listed in the email are the special events going on each night. where theres a headlining DJ
those ones have a slight upcharge. but you can still go to the other clubs that dont have a headlining DJ with no additional charge
when you arrive, you'll get the full breakdown from our onsite staff, and they'll let you kow which venues are applicable for each night
Do you have a WhatsApp number that I can text I have some questions I am in Cancun right now
I tried calling but it wasn't letting me call y
hey lmk if you need anything else

Hi hope you are doing well. I wanted to reach out to discuss some concerns regarding our recent trip. Unfortunately, my friends and I left the experience feeling very disappointed. Throughout the trip, we encountered multiple unexpected additional costs that were never clearly communicated to us in advance. It felt like each day required extra payments, which added up quickly and created a lot of frustration. In particular, we were surprised by fees at venues that we believed were already included, as well as high transaction fees when withdrawing money which is something we were not warned about beforehand. We have friends who booked through another company at similar price points and did not experience these issues, which made the situation even more concerning. We chose to book with you again because we had such a positive experience last year in Punta Cana and wanted to remain loyal. However, this trip did not meet those expectations, and it has made us hesitant about booking again in the future. I would really appreciate the opportunity to speak with someone directly about this situation and see if anything can be done to address our concerns.
Hey Meher I appreciate you reaching out and sharing this, I'm sorry to hear the trip didn't meet your expectations this time around
I'm definitely happy to connect and talk through everything so I can better understand your concerns
Let me know what time works for you and I'll make myself available
Thank you. Can you do Monday morning?
hey yes what time works for you Monday?
Hi good morning! Can you do 10:30?
Yup just on our team call now and then will call you right after
On the phone with someone I will call u after
Sorry can you call me now
Hey Meher, I'm able to get each of you refunded for the fee from the night of the 17th
How do we get the money back
hey hey. refund is getting processed should take 5-10 business days. via the card you used to make your trip payments on your portal
